props.name: texts
props.description: An array of text strings to be rotated.

props.name: rotationInterval
props.description: The interval (in milliseconds) between text rotations.

props.name: initial
props.description: Initial animation state for each element.

props.name: animatePresenceMode
props.description: Mode for AnimatePresence; for example, 'wait' to finish exit animations before entering.

props.name: animatePresenceInitial
props.description: Determines whether the AnimatePresence component should run its initial animation.

props.name: staggerFrom
props.description: Specifies the order from which the stagger starts.

props.name: loop
props.description: Determines if the rotation should loop back to the first text after the last one.

props.name: auto
props.description: If true, the text rotation starts automatically.

props.name: splitBy
props.description: Determines how the text is split into animatable elements (e.g., by characters, words, or lines).

props.name: onNext
props.description: Callback function invoked when the text rotates to the next item.

props.name: mainClassName
props.description: Additional class names for the main container element.

props.name: splitLevelClassName
props.description: Additional class names for the container wrapping each split group (e.g., a word).

props.name: elementLevelClassName
props.description: Additional class names for each individual animated element.
